title: Rogue Worlds
description: Transforms the game into a roguelike with many unique upgrades, custom structures and multiple levels
body:
## 🌀 Dive into the Depths!
Rogue Worlds is a datapack/mod that turns your Minecraft world into an action roguelike adventure! You’re trapped in a 4x4 chunk area, with nowhere to go but down. Each level of the world is its own biome filled with challenges and loot. Your goal? Find the hidden portal deep underground and descend to the next floor. When all players die you start from scratch at level 1.

<details>
<summary>The First Level</summary>
  
![The first level, an oak forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c7796539e951ba104987106ee0a2682a6412e6_0.webp)

</details>
<details>
  <summary>The Underground Portal</summary>
  
![The Underground Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ac636b930e394a129a869d7b450828cdc6aa4ce_0.webp)

</details>





## ⚔️ Progressively Increasing Difficulty
As you delve into deeper levels, the enemies get tougher and meteors arrive faster. Every new level brings a new biome and new mobs.

## 💰 XP = Coins
In this world, XP isn’t just for enchantments. Every orb you collect also grants coins that can be used for upgrades. Use them wisely.

## 🏪 Upgrade Shops
Throughout the level, you’ll stumble upon shops offering unique upgrades to make you stronger in exchange for coins!

<details>
<summary>Shop</summary>
  
![A shop underground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d91f047f6e1eea801b8f85c2893457f865f90094_0.webp)

</details>



## 🗡️ Custom Items
Many custom items have been added, such as 2 magic wands that cast powerful ranged spells, a reroll token which rerolls nearby shop upgrades, and many more!

## 🏗️ More Structures
A few new structures are introduced to the game with the datapack, as well as some vanilla structures such as trial chambers being more common.

<details>
<summary>One of the new structures</summary>
  
![Undead Guardians Dungeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfecd7ee5ea15f2bf23a39e0a5f33bd2380a065a_0.webp)

</details>



## 👥 Multiplayer Support
Bring your friends with you on your adventure! This datapack is fully multiplayer compatible and fully server sided! Work together to survive!
